array_types.name: CTRL_PAUSE_DBG_Field_Array

record_types.name: CTRL_PAUSE_DBG_Field
CTRL_Register

fields.name: TIME
fields.description: Pause the watchdog timer when JTAG is accessing the bus fabric

fields.name: PAUSE_JTAG
fields.description: Pause the watchdog timer when processor 0 is in debug mode

fields.name: Reserved_27_29
fields.description: When not enabled the watchdog timer is paused

record_types.name: LOAD_Register
REASON_Register
WATCHDOG_Peripheral

fields.name: CTRL
fields.description:
Load the watchdog timer. The maximum setting is 0xffffff which
corresponds to approximately 16 seconds.

fields.name: LOAD
fields.description:
Logs the reason for the last reset. Both bits are zero for the case
of a hardware reset. Additionally, as of RP2350, a debugger warm
reset of either core (SYSRESETREQ or hartreset) will also clear the
watchdog reason register, so that software loaded under the debugger
following a watchdog timeout will not continue to see the timeout
condition.

fields.name: REASON
fields.description:
Scratch register. Information persists through soft reset of the
chip.

fields.name: SCRATCH0
fields.description:
Scratch register. Information persists through soft reset of the
chip.

fields.description:
